global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a clear focus on food delivery services.
global.main_message: Promoting late-night food delivery with a reward incentive.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: BiteRush logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized logo with the word 'BiteRush' prominently displayed in a vibrant color.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A large, eye-catching text that reads 'Your cravings, delivered' in a strong font.

elements.label: Subheadline
elements.description: A smaller text below the headline that states 'Late-night deals available' in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: App interface
elements.description: A visual representation of the app interface showing three empty card slots, suggesting a selection of food items.

elements.label: Top corner icon
elements.description: A small decorative icon positioned in the top corner, possibly representing a user-generated content badge.

elements.label: Top corner icon
elements.description: Another small decorative icon in the top corner, adding visual interest to the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom of the ad that says 'Claim reward' in a contrasting color.
elements.text_content: Your cravings, delivered Late-night deals available

elements.label: User-generated content
elements.description: Text indicating user-generated content, labeled 'UGC', positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Reward claim text
elements.description: A small text at the bottom that encourages users to claim their reward.
